rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WON FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Re Financial Elder Abuse; Objections To Account; To Compel Trustee To Account; Breach Of Trust And Fiduciary Duty; For Surcharge, Fees And Da
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: Notice of Hearing has been given on the Third Amended Petition filed by Donna Ing; however, the following issues are noted: a. Many of the accounts listed in the notice (Chase Bank, East West Bank, Gateway Bank, and Citibank) were not referenced in the petition. In addition, no account numbers are provided. b. Real property was generally described in the petition as being located in Suisun City, CA; however, the notice specifies the address of the real property as being 451 Canfield Court. c. Brian Jeung and Rodney Jeung were provided personal notice; however, occupants at their alleged residences were provided that notice, not the respondents themselves.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARL EDWARD GALLAGHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/3/20. No earlier date available. Still no proposed order. No courtesy copy of the proof of publication filed on 12/17/19 and proof of subscribing witness have been received by the Examiner as of 12/19/19. If the published notice did not clearly indicate that the will is lost, notice of the third amended petition will have to be published again. The caption of the third amended petition is incomplete if the petitioner seeks IAEA authority. A copy of the lost will was not attached to the courtesy copy of the third amended petition. Item 5a(7) or (8) of the third amended petition must be checked.
